series_metadata.series_description: Includes informaiton about vectors such as insects ticks, mammals, and birds, which transmit diseases to humans. Includes testing of these disease hosts, and serology testing. Included diseases are lyme disease, rocky mountain spotted, arvo virus, and en

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Maintain in office for two years, then transfer to the State Records Center for storage. Maintain at State Records Center for three yrs. then destroy provided State Archive determines there is no historical value., Paper: Archives
